data.title: Multi-Layer Authentication
data.description: Advanced user authentication systems that offer multiple layers of security for accounts.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates OAuth 2.0 and two-factor authentication methods.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Video and user data are encrypted in transit and at rest to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: TLS for transport encryption and AES for storage encryption.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Robust distributed denial-of-service attack mitigation to maintain service availability.
data.technical_spec: Uses traffic filtering and anomaly detection techniques to thwart DDoS attacks.

data.title: Content Moderation Algorithms
data.description: Automated systems and machine learning algorithms for detecting and removing inappropriate content.
data.technical_spec: AI-driven analysis and community flagging for enforcement.

data.title: Secure API Integration
data.description: Allows third-party applications to safely interact with YouTube through secure APIs.
data.technical_spec: API keys and quotas used to control access and usage.
